title: Carpet freshener powder
subtitle: A bicarbonate of soda and arrowroot powder blend scented with lavender and tea tree
excerpt: Carpet freshener powder works by allowing bicarbonate of soda to adsorb odours from the carpet fibres during the dwell time. It is shaken on, left for 15 minutes, and vacuumed off. Arrowroot powder absorbs moisture and prevents clumping; essential oils add fresh scent.
sourceNotes: Bicarbonate of soda carpet deodoriser method from standard natural cleaning references.

recipe.batchNotes: Make in any quantity. Stores for 12 months.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 12 months in a sealed shaker jar. The essential oil scent fades over time. Add fresh drops to the jar and shake to refresh.

recipeTools.notes: Wide holes allow powder to fall evenly

glossaryTerms.definition: Sodium bicarbonate. A mild alkali that adsorbs acidic odour molecules from surfaces and neutralises them. The primary active ingredient in this carpet freshener.
A fine, starchy powder extracted from the arrowroot plant. Used in powdered products to absorb moisture, prevent clumping, and give a smoother, lighter texture.
The binding of volatile odour molecules to a surface. Bicarbonate of soda adsorbs carpet odours during the dwell time and is removed with them when vacuumed.
The period a product is left in contact with a surface before removal. A 15-minute dwell time is sufficient for bicarbonate of soda to adsorb surface carpet odours.

content.text: Bicarbonate of soda freshens carpets through
: it binds odour-causing molecules in the carpet fibres to its surface and is removed by vacuuming.

of 15 minutes is the minimum; 30 minutes is more effective. Vacuum thoroughly after the dwell period to remove all powder. Shelf life is 12 months.

items.prepNote: Approximately 1 g; added drop by drop to avoid lumping

content.text: Combine bicarbonate of soda and arrowroot powder in a bowl and stir well. Add the essential oils drop by drop, stirring after every 5 drops to distribute evenly and prevent lumps. Transfer to the shaker jar.

To use: shake the powder evenly across the carpet. Leave for 15 to 30 minutes. Vacuum thoroughly, making two or three passes to remove all the powder. Do not use on damp carpet. Do not apply near pets or children who may inhale the powder.

Store in the sealed shaker jar. Shelf life is 12 months. If the powder clumps, break it up with a fork before use. Refresh the scent by adding 10 drops of essential oil to the jar, sealing, and shaking.
